creator: trevor@jpj.net
text:
Hi, Chris.  I've updated aumix, and here are the changes for the port.  I
know it's short notice, but it'd be great if you could squeeze this in for
4.0-RELEASE, pretty please. :-)  Besides applying this patch,
patches/patch-ac should be removed from the port, since the change has
been incorporated in aumix itself.  I've updated the contents of intl/
with files from a more recent GNU gettext, which seems to require GNU
make.

How-To-Repeat: N/A
